name: Dashboard Importer
description: Builds a Ragnarok workbook model from dashboard.xlsx using a bundled copy of the simplePyPSA_KR pre-optimisation pipeline.

dashboard_path.label: Dashboard workbook path
dashboard_path.description: Path to dashboard.xlsx. Supports ${HOME} and ${PROJECT_ROOT}. The dashboard's model path is resolved relative to the dashboard file when it is not absolute.

preserve_existing_loads.label: Keep Ragnarok loads
preserve_existing_loads.description: When enabled, non-empty incoming loads / loads-p_set sheets from Ragnarok override the dashboard-built export so you can maintain demand in the UI. Those loads must still reference buses that exist in the imported dashboard model.

export_path.label: Debug export path
export_path.description: Optional path for exporting the built Ragnarok workbook model as XLSX for inspection. Leave blank to skip writing a file.
